title: Asha Feels the Wind
synopsis: Baby Asha explores different feelings as she experiences gentle wind through her senses, from the whoosh in her hair to the rustle of leaves, discovering joy and wonder in nature's simple pleasures.

illustration.description: Baby Asha with warm brown skin and curly black hair stands in a sunny garden, arms outstretched as gentle wind blows through her hair. She wears a soft yellow dress and has a delighted expression with bright, sparkling eyes. Pastel flowers and green grass surround her in soft watercolor strokes.
illustration.alt: Baby Asha feeling wind in garden

pages.text: Wind in her hair. Swish, swish!

illustration.description: Close-up of Asha's joyful face as her curly hair dances in the breeze, with soft golden sunlight filtering through. Her dark eyes are wide with wonder and her mouth forms a small 'o' of surprise. Gentle pastel yellows and warm browns dominate the soft, dreamy composition.

pages.text: Wind on her face. Gentle whoosh!

illustration.description: Asha tilts her face up toward the sky with closed eyes and a peaceful smile, feeling the soft breeze. Her chubby cheeks are rosy and her expression shows pure contentment. Soft blue sky with wispy white clouds creates a serene backdrop in gentle watercolor washes.

Asha claps her hands with glee as colorful autumn leaves swirl around her in the gentle breeze. The leaves are painted in warm oranges, soft reds, and golden yellows. Her expression shows pure delight as she watches the natural dance above her head.

Asha reaches toward tall, soft pink and lavender flowers that bend gracefully in the wind. A diverse group of children play quietly in the background - a boy with light skin and red hair, and a girl with medium brown skin and braids. The scene is painted in gentle pastels with rounded, soft shapes.

Asha sits beneath a large, friendly tree with soft green leaves that rustle overhead. She looks up with wonder, one finger to her lips as if listening to the tree's whispers. Dappled sunlight creates warm golden spots on her face and the grassy ground around her.

pages.text: Wind feels happy. Asha feels happy too!

illustration.description: Asha spreads her arms wide and spins joyfully in the garden, her yellow dress twirling around her. Her face radiates pure happiness with a big smile and twinkling eyes. Soft swirls of wind are suggested by gentle curved lines in pale blue and white around her spinning figure.

pages.text: Thank you, wind. Shhh... peaceful now.

illustration.description: Asha sits peacefully on soft grass, arms wrapped around her knees in a gentle hug, with a serene smile. The wind has calmed to a gentle breeze. A diverse family - including parents with different skin tones - can be seen in the soft background, creating a warm, inclusive community feeling.

metadata.illustrationStyle: Soft, rounded shapes with warm pastel colors. Gentle watercolor feel. Large, friendly faces. High contrast for baby eyes. Simple backgrounds.

questions.question: What sound does the wind make?
questions.explanation: The wind makes a 'whoosh' sound as it blows through Asha's hair and around the garden.

questions.question: How does Asha feel at the end?
questions.explanation: Asha feels peaceful and calm after playing with the gentle wind.

questions.question: What color is Asha's dress?
questions.explanation: Asha wears a soft yellow dress while playing in the windy garden.
